purpose: settings.graph_attribute_parsing=false: load_graph skips attribute-to-fact conversion at load time (the else branch at pyreason.py:604-608 leaves the graph-fact lists and specific-label dicts empty), so with no user facts nothing ever changes — the rule never grounds, derived(B) never appears, trace-node is empty, and the perfect-convergence exit fires at t=0 (interpretation.py:674-680 with max_facts_time=0 and max_rules_time=0), so get_time reads 1 and every filter probe carries a single empty frame against the twin graph-attr-parsing-on's three frames and get_time=3 (verified at authoring — the harness judges each case within one knob position) — the nondefault-false-skip and read-at-load-time classes.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:graph_attribute_parsing nondefault-false-skip + read-at-load-time
